title: Chiloschista exuperei
taxonomy: Chiloschista exuperei is a species of orchid in the genus Chiloschista. This genus is a group of orchids within the subfamily Cranichidoideae. The subfamily Cranichidoideae is part of the family Orchidaceae. The family Orchidaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as orchids. Chiloschista exuperei's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.

intro: Chiloschista exuperei, also known as the Exupère's orchid or Himalayan orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities, contributing to its potential health benefits. Bioactive constituents of Chiloschista exuperei include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Chiloschista exuperei is commonly used to prepare herbal infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including hypertension and digestive issues.
